mapper.select:
WITH committees AS ( -- 기간내 위원회 일정 목록 조회 쿼리 SELECT c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no, c.location, c.comm_nm AS title, CASE WHEN c.comm_dt IS NOT NULL AND c.comm_at IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(c.comm_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(c.comm_at FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN c.comm_dt IS NOT NULL AND c.comm_at IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(c.comm_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(c.comm_at FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, c.comm_agenda AS agenda, c.comm_div, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(cm.percent), 0), 1) AS agreement_rate, COALESCE(COUNT(cm.doc_seq), 0) AS agreement_count, c.created_at FROM esg.tb_committee c LEFT JOIN esg.tb_committee_content_map cm ON c.write_year = cm.write_year AND c.doc_type = cm.doc_type AND c.doc_no = cm.doc_no WHERE c.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND c.comm_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, :end_date /* 위원회 종류 질의 조건 필요시 주석해제 */
AND c.doc_type IN (#{category}) -- category: OHC or PAC
AND c.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no ), participant AS ( -- 참석자 및 결재라인 정보 조회 쿼리 SELECT c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'company' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS company_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'partner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partner_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'employee' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS employee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'company' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_company_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'partner' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_partner_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'employee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_employee_count, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee') AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee') AND ai.signature IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN false END AS signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS approver_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS writer_signed, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS reviewer_signed, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS approver_signed FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN committees c ON ai.target_type = c.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(c.write_year, c.doc_no) AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee', 'writer', 'reviewer', 'approver') GROUP BY c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no ) SELECT -- 목록 조회 쿼리 본문 CONCAT(c.write_year, '-', c.doc_type, '-', c.doc_no) AS id, c.doc_type AS category, c.location, c.title, CASE WHEN c.comm_div = 'E' THEN 'REGULAR' ELSE 'ADHOC' END AS type, json_build_object( 'company', p.company_count, 'partner', p.partner_count, 'employee', p.employee_count, 'signedCompany', p.signed_company_count, 'signedPartner', p.signed_partner_count, 'signedEmployee', p.signed_employee_count ) AS participantCount, c.agenda, c.agreement_count AS agreementCount, c.agreement_rate AS agreementRate, p.signed, CASE WHEN p.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.writer_hr_id, 'name', p.writer_name, 'jobTitle', p.writer_job_title, 'orgName', p.writer_org_name, 'signed', p.writer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, CASE WHEN p.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', p.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', p.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', p.reviewer_org_name, 'signed', p.reviewer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, CASE WHEN p.approver_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.approver_hr_id, 'name', p.approver_name, 'jobTitle', p.approver_job_title, 'orgName', p.approver_org_name, 'signed', p.approver_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS approver, c.started_at AS startedAt, c.ended_at AS endedAt, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM participant p JOIN committees c ON c.write_year = p.write_year AND c.doc_type = p.doc_type AND c.doc_no = p.doc_no /* 나와 관련된 위원회만 조회시 주석 해제 */
AND ( p.signed IS NOT NULL OR p.writer_hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id OR p.reviewer_hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id OR p.approver_hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id )

WITH committee AS ( -- 대상 위원회 조회 SELECT c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no, c.location, c.comm_nm AS title, c.remark, CASE WHEN c.comm_dt IS NOT NULL AND c.comm_at IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(c.comm_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(c.comm_at FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN c.comm_dt IS NOT NULL AND c.comm_at IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(c.comm_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(c.comm_at FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, c.comm_agenda AS agenda, c.comm_div, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(cm.percent), 0), 1) AS agreement_rate, COALESCE(COUNT(cm.doc_seq), 0) AS agreement_count, c.created_at FROM esg.tb_committee c LEFT JOIN esg.tb_committee_content_map cm ON c.write_year = cm.write_year AND c.doc_type = cm.doc_type AND c.doc_no = cm.doc_no WHERE c.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND c.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND c.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND c.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND c.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no LIMIT 1 ), participant AS ( -- 참석자 및 결재라인 정보 조회 쿼리 SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'company' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS company_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'partner' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partner_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'employee' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS employee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'company' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_company_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'partner' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_partner_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'employee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_employee_count, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id -- 조회자 ID AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee') AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id -- 조회자 ID AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee') AND ai.signature IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN false END AS signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS approver_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS writer_signed, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS reviewer_signed, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN true ELSE false END AS approver_signed FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN committee c ON ai.target_type = c.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(c.write_year, c.doc_no) AND ai.type IN ('company', 'partner', 'employee', 'writer', 'reviewer', 'approver') GROUP BY c.write_year, c.doc_type, c.doc_no ), agreements AS ( SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'id', CONCAT(cm.write_year, '-', cm.doc_type, '-', cm.doc_no, '-', cm.doc_seq), 'content', cm.content, 'rate', cm.percent, 'order', cm.ord_seq
) ) agreements FROM committee c LEFT JOIN esg.tb_committee_content_map cm ON c.write_year = cm.write_year AND c.doc_type = cm.doc_type AND c.doc_no = cm.doc_no ) SELECT -- 상세 조회 쿼리 본문 CONCAT(c.write_year, '-', c.doc_type, '-', c.doc_no) AS id, c.doc_type AS category, c.location, c.title, c.remark AS comment, CASE WHEN c.comm_div = 'E' THEN 'REGULAR' ELSE 'ADHOC' END AS type, json_build_object( 'company', p.company_count, 'partner', p.partner_count, 'employee', p.employee_count, 'signedCompany', p.signed_company_count, 'signedPartner', p.signed_partner_count, 'signedEmployee', p.signed_employee_count ) AS participantCount, c.agenda, c.agreement_count AS agreementCount, c.agreement_rate AS agreementRate, a.agreements, p.signed, CASE WHEN p.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.writer_hr_id, 'name', p.writer_name, 'jobTitle', p.writer_job_title, 'orgName', p.writer_org_name, 'signed', p.writer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, CASE WHEN p.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', p.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', p.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', p.reviewer_org_name, 'signed', p.reviewer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, CASE WHEN p.approver_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.approver_hr_id, 'name', p.approver_name, 'jobTitle', p.approver_job_title, 'orgName', p.approver_org_name, 'signed', p.approver_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS approver, c.started_at AS startedAt, c.ended_at AS endedAt, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM committee c LEFT JOIN participant p ON TRUE LEFT JOIN agreements a ON TRUE
